query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_pendentes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_endereco,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address IS NULL OR address = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_endereco,
  SUM(CASE WHEN addressNumber IS NOT NULL AND addressNumber != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_numero,
  SUM(CASE WHEN complement IS NOT NULL AND complement != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_complemento,
  SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NOT NULL AND description != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_descricao,
  SUM(CASE WHEN neighborhood IS NOT NULL AND neighborhood != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_bairro,
  SUM(CASE WHEN phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_telefone,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hours IS NOT NULL AND hours != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_horario,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hasMenu = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_cardapio
FROM establishments 
WHERE status = 'pending';
